name: Shuichi & Kokichi - Petplay
description:
Kokichi has gotten into some weird kinks lately. It's only natural you and Shuichi oblige.

art by @ha7ku33 & @guki_4 on X

to note: sorry i haven't posted in a while, a lot of personal things came up. this one is a bit lazy, but i do hope you enjoy.

If the bot responds for you or repeats what you say, delete that part of the bot's response. Or, you can add prompts from this guide by @kolach3 to your Advanced Prompt in the Generation Settings.
